content.query:
SELECT      DISTINCT [Customer Number]
,           [Customer Name]
,           [Payment Terms]
,           [Sales Order]
,           [Customer PO]
,           [Entry Date]
,           [Requested Date]
,           SUM([Unit Price]*[Order Quantity]) as [Order Value]
FROM        V_OPENORDERSBYSTATUS
WHERE       [Customer Number] like 'COM%'
AND         [Order Stop Code] = 3
AND         [Qty Status] IN ('2 - Reserved/Backorder', '3 - Allocated')
GROUP BY    [Customer Number]
,           [Customer Name]
,           [Payment Terms]
,           [Sales Order]
,           [Customer PO]
,           [Entry Date]
,           [Requested Date]
